title: Art Class 美术课
scene: 美术课上，老师教同学们画一棵大树。

lines.en: Good afternoon, class! Today we are going to draw a tree.
lines.zh: 下午好，同学们！今天我们来画一棵树。

lines.en: Mr. Liu, what kind of tree should we draw?
lines.zh: 刘老师，我们应该画什么树？

lines.en: Any tree you like! First, draw the trunk with brown color.
lines.zh: 你喜欢的任何树！首先，用棕色画树干。

lines.en: Yes! Use green for the leaves. You can also add some fruit.
lines.zh: 对！用绿色画树叶。你还可以加一些水果。

lines.en: Can I draw an apple tree? I love apples!
lines.zh: 我可以画苹果树吗？我喜欢苹果！

lines.en: Of course! That's a great idea, Mia.
Should I draw some grass at the bottom too?
lines.zh: 我也应该在底部画些草吗？

lines.en: Yes, that will make your picture look even better!
lines.zh: 是的，那会让你的画看起来更好看！

lines.en: Thank you, Mr. Liu! I can't wait to start drawing!
lines.zh: 谢谢您，刘老师！我迫不及待要开始画了！
